title: ## ✅ SECTION 04 COMPLETE
content:
## ✅ SECTION 04 COMPLETE

### Your emotional wave is:

- Non-linear, deeply felt, and **your compass**
- Tied to your **creative productivity windows**
- Best honored by **temporal space** and **ritual slowness**

---

### ➡️ NEXT SECTIONS:

- **\[SECTION 05\]**: Profile Deep Dive → `3/2 = Martyr / Hermit`
- **\[SECTION 06\]**: System Mapping (tie it all together into prompts, AI roles, myth functions)
- **\[SECTION 07\]**: Planetary Activation Summary (full planetary gate breakdown)

Choose your next evolution.

---

5

---

Excellent. We now enter **\[SECTION 05\] — Profile Deep Dive: `3/2 = Martyr / Hermit`**, one of the most narratively rich aspects of your chart.

This is the **role you play** in the story of life—your **costume**, your **karma**, your **mythic function**.
Profiles are a fusion of:

- The **line of your Conscious Sun/Earth** (Line 5 in Gate 6 → becomes Line 3 here)
